# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: demo-deployment
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: demoapp
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: demoapp
    spec:
      containers:
      - image: nginx
        name: httpd
        ports: 
        - containerPort: 80
          name: http
        securityContext: 
          capabilities: 
            drop: 
            - ALL
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
        volumeMounts:  
        - mountPath: /etc/nginx/conf.d 
          name: config-volume
      volumes: 
      - configMap: 
          name: nginxconfig 
        name: config-volume
